events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess frayed/burned webbing in fall protection. It's fail, high/critical risk, rough-complete, installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, maybe failed. percent_complete maybe 80. value? No numeric reading asked; visible enough estimate. Could set value 0 or maybe severity count. sound_source etc default empty? Schema says use for audio/video tasks; set sound_source "" event_time 0 rate 0 order empty. workable empty. findings: frayed/burned webbing on fall protection component, compromised strength, not within tolerance. actions: remove from service, replace webbing/lanyard/harness, inspect per OSHA. rationale: OSHA prohibits use of defective or damaged fall protection equipment; frayed/burned webbing indicates loss of structural integrity, beyond allowable condition. references: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. Need valid JSON only, no prose. Ensure decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. risk critical maybe high. Let's choose critical due to life safety. component_conditions list includes installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. Maybe not failed unless tested; but frayed/burned is failed condition. Include failed. percent_complete 85. confidence 0.95. value 0. Need include all fields.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant", "worn", "degraded", "failed"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Frayed/burned webbing observed on fall protection component.",
    "Webbing damage indicates loss of structural integrity and load-bearing capacity.",
    "Equipment is not within acceptable tolerance for safe use."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the damaged fall protection equipment from service.",
    "Replace the frayed/burned webbing or the entire affected component/harness/lanyard.",
    "Inspect all related fall protection gear before returning to service.",
    "Document the defect and replacement in the service record."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA fall protection standards require personal fall arrest systems and components to be inspected and removed from service when damaged or defective. Frayed or burned webbing is a visible, out-of-tolerance condition that compromises the equipment's ability to arrest a fall, creating a life-safety hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart M",
    "OSHA 1910.140"
  ]
}
